extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter attacked solo in final 800m on uphill finish, bridged to Porte's earlier dig, held off Matthews/Martin despite unclipping mid-sprint
tactical_patterns: PORTE Richie attacked 800m out attempting to recover time-trial losses, forcing GC-caliber pace before uphill sprint.
SAGAN bridged alone to Porte then hesitated mid-effort, yet still accelerated again when caught by chasers.
BMC positioned both GC rider Porte and sprinter Van Avermaet at front, dual-option tactic on uphill finish.
Nathan BROWN opportunistically collected KOM points in breakaway, targeting jersey despite team sprint obligations.

rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: attacked solo 800m out on steep uphill finish to recover time-trial deficit, forcing GC riders into emergency effort
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: bridged alone to Porte attack far from finish then re-accelerated after losing momentum and unclipping
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: positioned on Sagan's wheel in final 800m but couldn't come around despite Sagan's mechanical issue
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: Quick-Step rider in blue bridged with Matthews group but couldn't match Sagan's final acceleration
rider_signals.BROWN Nathan: positive: Cannondale-Drapac rider collected KOM points in breakaway on first Tour, trading sprint duties for classification
